findings.thai: แบ่งงานกันใหม่
findings.reason: แบ่ง (baeng) is a mid-class consonant with a mai ek tone mark, resulting in a low tone. ใหม่ (mai) is a high-class consonant cluster with a mai ek tone mark, resulting in a low tone.

findings.thai: แบบนี้เข้าใจง่ายขึ้น
findings.reason: เข้า (khao) is a high-class consonant with a mai tho tone mark, resulting in a falling tone, not rising.

findings.thai: แบบนี้ปลอดภัยกว่า
findings.reason: ภัย (phai) is a low-class consonant with a live syllable ending, resulting in a mid tone, not high.

findings.thai: แบบฝึกหัดนี้
findings.reason: ฝึก (fuek) is a high-class consonant with a dead syllable ending, resulting in a low tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ปฏิเสธอีกครั้ง
findings.reason: The phrase has 5 syllables (bpa-ti-set iik khrang), but only 4 tones were provided. The correct tones are low, low, low, low, high.

findings.thai: ประกาศเมื่อวาน
findings.reason: เมื่อ (muea) is a low-class consonant with a mai ek tone mark, resulting in a falling tone. วาน (waan) is a low-class consonant with a live syllable ending, resulting in a mid tone.

findings.thai: ประชุมสั้นๆ ยังงง
findings.reason: สั้น (san) is a high-class consonant with a mai tho tone mark, resulting in a falling tone, not high.

findings.thai: ประเด็นนี้เกี่ยวกับลูกค้า
findings.reason: The phrase has 7 syllables, but only 6 tones were provided. ประ (bpra) is low tone, and กับ (gap) is low tone.
ประ (bpra) is a mid-class consonant with a short vowel dead syllable, resulting in a low tone, not mid.
โยชน์ (yot) is a low-class consonant with a long vowel dead syllable, resulting in a falling tone, not low.

findings.thai: ประหยัดด้วย
findings.reason: หยัด (yat) is a high-class consonant cluster with a dead syllable ending, resulting in a low tone, not falling.
ประ (bpra) is a mid-class consonant with a short vowel dead syllable, resulting in a low tone, not mid.

findings.thai: ปรับระบบบริการใหม่
findings.reason: ระ (ra) and ริ (ri) are low-class consonants with short vowel dead syllables, resulting in high tones. ใหม่ (mai) is a high-class consonant cluster with a mai ek tone mark, resulting in a low tone.

findings.thai: ปรับสีใหม่
findings.reason: ใหม่ (mai) is a high-class consonant cluster with a mai ek tone mark, resulting in a low tone, not falling.
ภัย (phai) is a low-class consonant with a live syllable ending, resulting in a mid tone, not high.
ป่วย (bpuay) is a mid-class consonant with a mai ek tone mark, resulting in a low tone, not falling.
